name: The Clubhouse Indoor Golf & Lounge
about: The Clubhouse Indoor Golf & Lounge is an indoor golf simulator venue in Davenport, IA, featuring 4 aboutGolf Simulators. It operates as a full-service facility with a club shop offering repair, regripping, retrofitting, and custom fitting services, alongside private lessons available by appointment. The venue combines golf simulation with a lounge atmosphere, providing bottled beer, draft beer, wine, spirits, and custom cocktails, along with a patio featuring TVs for outdoor enjoyment. It hosts seasonal golf leagues and is available for private events and parties outside of normal business hours.
why_golfers_like_it: 17 different practice venues including Our World Long Drive range and scenic locations like waterfalls and canyons
Full-service club shop with professional re-gripping, loft/lie adjustment machines, and club repair services
Spacious patio with TVs for a relaxed atmosphere when not golfing

food_and_drink.notes: No food offerings mentioned on the website
Full service bar offering bottled beer, draft beer, wine, spirits, and custom cocktails

simulator_hardware.notes: Four aboutGolf Simulators with over 85 courses available

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: The club shop offers rental clubs and services, but bringing your own clubs is recommended for the best experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drink?
faq.answer: No outside food or drink is allowed, as the venue offers a full bar with bottled beer, draft beer, wine, spirits, and custom cocktails.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: For 2-person teams, it takes approximately 1 hour; for 4-person teams, it takes about 2 hours.

faq.question: Is The Clubhouse kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue offers lessons and services for golfers of all ages and skill levels, including juniors and youth.
